subcodes.first_line: This is a Book from Our presence unto her who hath believed in God, her Lord, and hath attained unto the effulgent lights of sanctity and hath quaffed the choice wine [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: هذا کتاب من لدنا الی التی آمنت بالله ربها و فازت بانوار القدس و شربت رحیق
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual prerequisites of teaching the Cause, @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @worldliness vs. other-worldliness, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience
